name: squadquarium-app
description: Native Tauri 2 window wrapper for the squadquarium web UI.

scripts.build: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('cargo --version',{stdio:'ignore'});}catch{console.log('[squadquarium-app] Rust toolchain not found. Install via https://rustup.rs/ — skipping tauri build.');process.exit(0);}if(process.platform==='win32'){try{execSync('where link.exe',{stdio:'ignore'});}catch{console.log('[squadquarium-app] MSVC linker link.exe not found. Install Visual Studio Build Tools with C++ support — skipping tauri build.');process.exit(0);}}execSync('tauri build',{stdio:'inherit'});"
